abstract: Please note -- this event requires RSVP on this website (Need Your Phone Number) Hugging Face Founder @ClementDelangue & team members will be hosting a big community event in San Francisco this Friday evening. Please join us for this exciting event in-person in San Francisco!
event_title: [Partner Event] HuggingFace Open Source AI Meetup
title: HuggingFace Open Source AI Meetup
